development_pass_verified.change_1: Display impl on KernelError + std::error::Error behind std feature — VERIFIED
development_pass_verified.change_2: Guard bypass: transition() rejects guarded transitions — VERIFIED, TOCTOU analysis CLEAN
development_pass_verified.change_3: Vec::remove(0) -> VecDeque::pop_front() in persist_store, irreversibility_auditor, transition_engine — VERIFIED
development_pass_verified.change_4: proptest removed from dev-deps, async feature stub removed — VERIFIED
development_pass_verified.change_5: max_depth enforced in dfs_detect (recursion_detector) — VERIFIED, off-by-one analysis CLEAN
development_pass_verified.change_6: Guard expression parser precedence fixed: || now lower than && — VERIFIED, edge cases traced
development_pass_verified.change_7: Dual license/license-file removed from nexcore-state-os/Cargo.toml — VERIFIED
development_pass_verified.change_8: Stub routing strategies (Random/Affinity) documented in location_router — VERIFIED
development_pass_verified.change_9: Overflow guard added to StateRegistry::next_id — VERIFIED
development_pass_verified.change_10: 5 new tests added — VERIFIED (operator precedence test confirmed correct)

findings.description: PredicateFn type alias is pub-exported but never stored, accepted, or used anywhere. Zero callers in nexcore-mcp, nexcore-api, nexcore-os. No method on GuardEvaluator accepts or stores a PredicateFn.
findings.fix_applied: Added doc comment clarifying PredicateFn is a reserved extension point for future programmatic predicate attachment that supplements the string-expression evaluator. Type alias retained as stable API extension surface.

findings.description: evaluate_expression() has a silent failure mode: variable names containing '&&' or '||' as substrings cause silent misparse. This constraint was not documented in the function-level doc, in GuardContext::set_bool, or anywhere else.
findings.fix_applied: Added '## Variable name constraint' section to evaluate_expression() rustdoc. Added '# Name constraint' section to GuardContext::set_bool rustdoc. Safe examples (ready, a, order_valid) vs unsafe (check&&ready, flag||true) explicitly documented.

findings.description: Two unit tests used 'let _ = kernel.transition(mid, tid)' for setup transitions. If transition() returned Err, the test continued silently and subsequent assertions passed vacuously. The tests claimed to verify terminal/absorbing state blocking but never verified the precondition transition succeeded.
findings.fix_applied: Both 'let _ =' patterns replaced with 'assert!(kernel.transition(mid, tid).is_ok(), "<descriptive message>")' giving clear failure diagnostics.

findings.description: nexcore-state-theory/Cargo.toml contains both 'license' and 'license-file' fields, producing a Cargo warning on every build of nexcore-state-os.
findings.deferral_reason: File is in nexcore-state-theory, a dependency crate outside the declared scan scope. Fix: remove the 'license' field from nexcore-state-theory/Cargo.toml, retain only 'license-file = "LICENSE"'.

findings.description: Three behaviors untested after the development pass: (1) double negation '!!a', (2) evaluate_by_name() returning None for unregistered guard, (3) evaluate_by_name() returning Some with correct result. Unit test count was 102 after development pass.
findings.fix_applied: Added test_double_negation, test_evaluate_by_name_not_found, test_evaluate_by_name_registered. Unit test count: 102 -> 105.

findings.description: The crate declares '#![cfg_attr(not(feature = "std"), no_std)]' + 'extern crate alloc' claiming no_std compatibility, but 'cargo build --no-default-features' produced 7 compile errors: 'vec!' macro not in scope (recursion_detector.rs:96), 'ToString' trait not in scope (existence_validator.rs x4, mapping_transformer.rs x1, machine.rs x1). The claim was theater — it compiled under std where both are implicitly available but failed without std.
findings.fix_applied: Added 'use alloc::vec;' to recursion_detector.rs. Changed 'use alloc::string::String;' to 'use alloc::string::{String, ToString};' in existence_validator.rs, mapping_transformer.rs, and machine.rs. 'cargo build --no-default-features' now succeeds cleanly.

verification.no_std_build: PASS — cargo build --no-default-features: 0 errors after Fix 6
verification.api_breakage_check: NONE — history(), trail(), all() tuple-slice callers: 0 in nexcore-mcp, nexcore-api, nexcore-os
verification.toctou_analysis: CLEAN — guard bypass uses shared borrow before any mutation; single-threaded &mut self prevents concurrent access
verification.parser_correctness: VERIFIED — !a&&b, a&&!b, !a||b, a||!b&&c, !!a all produce correct results via trace analysis and new tests
